## SK Hynix partners with TetraMem on AI memory technology breakthrough

A partnership extending SK Hynix's AI memory R&D signals the company is broadening its technology roadmap beyond its current HBM franchise; if the TetraMem collaboration represents a next-generation memory architecture, it could widen SK Hynix's competitive moat relative to memory peers over the medium term.

- SK Hynix has entered a partnership with TetraMem described as an AI memory breakthrough.
- The collaboration is framed as a technology advance rather than a supply or commercial distribution deal.
- TetraMem is a named partner in the headline; the specific nature of the breakthrough or memory architecture involved is not elaborated.
- No financial terms, production timeline, or performance metrics are cited in the headline.
